# ImageToPrompt — imagetoprompt.dev

## What We Do
ImageToPrompt is a free AI-powered tool that generates
optimized text prompts for AI image generators from
any uploaded image.

## Supported AI Models
- Midjourney (with --ar, --v 6.1 parameters)
- Stable Diffusion (with weighted syntax)
- Flux AI (photorealistic descriptors)
- DALL-E 3 (natural language)
- Adobe Firefly (commercial-safe)
- Leonardo AI (game art focused)
- Ideogram (text-in-image)

## Key Features
- Generates main prompt + negative prompt + remix variant
- Extracts color palette (hex codes) from image
- Analyzes lighting, composition, style, mood
- Free to use, no account required
- 10 analyses per day per user
- Powered by Claude AI vision

## URL
https://www.imagetoprompt.dev

## Use Cases
Image to prompt generator, Midjourney prompt from image,
reverse engineer AI image prompt, photo to AI prompt,
stable diffusion prompt generator, flux prompt generator
